description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build C library that runs on push to branches excluding gh-readonly-queue/** and on tags matching v*, as well as on pull requests and merge groups. The workflow has a concurrency policy that cancels in-progress jobs for the same workflow and ref. Define a matrix job build_c that runs on ubuntu-22.04 for multiple tensorflow versions, checks out the repository, packages the C library, uploads artifacts, tests the C library, and releases the artifact on tag pushes. Additionally, define a test_c job that depends on build_c, downloads the artifact, and tests building from the C library. Finally, define a pass job that depends on build_c and test_c and verifies that both jobs succeeded.
